headline: MARKET WRAP — Jun 10
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Jun 10, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Markets closed in clear risk-off mode with defensives leading while growth assets faced broad selling pressure. The volatility spike underscored shifting sentiment as investors rotated toward safety amid crypto ecosystem weakness. Tomorrow's session will test whether this defensive bid has legs or represents temporary positioning ahead of key data releases.
